style_guidance: Personal, lifestyle, and relational content (food with friends, coffee moments, personal photos) drastically outperforms educational medical content. The top-performing post (543 reach, 119 likes, 1 save) was a simple food/friendship image. Educational posts about diseases are getting near-zero engagement (9-69 reach, 0 saves/shares). Either pivot toward personal brand storytelling that occasionally weaves in health tips, or completely rebrand as a pure medical education account with different content strategy.
